title: About Me
description: Hi, I’m a passionate Web Developer & Designer who loves building modern, user-friendly, and creative digital experiences. My goal is to craft solutions that make an impact.
missionDescription: To create meaningful digital experiences that combine functionality, performance, and design. I aim to deliver projects that help businesses and individuals grow.
visionDescription: To be recognized as a creative professional who blends technology and design to bring innovative solutions to life.
